design_note: SRS-aligned notifications endpoint test pack. 3 endpoints, 40 test cases each.

test_cases.test_description: Verify authenticated user can retrieve their notifications.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.
test_cases.expected_result: 200; notifications array returned; pagination metadata present.

test_cases.test_description: Verify filtering by status=UNREAD returns only unread notifications.
test_cases.preconditions: Authenticated user; mix of READ/UNREAD notifications.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify filtering by status=READ returns only read notifications.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify empty array returned when user has no notifications.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify default page=1, pageSize applied when not specified.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify first page returns correct subset.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify second page returns next subset.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify page beyond total returns empty data.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify page=0 is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify pageSize=0 is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify pageSize exceeding maximum is rejected or capped.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify unauthenticated request is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify invalid bearer token is rejected.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify user only receives their own notifications.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify foreign-tenant user cannot access another tenant's notifications.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.
test_cases.expected_result: 200; only empty or own-tenant notifications; no cross-tenant leakage.

test_cases.test_description: Verify each notification has notificationId.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify each notification has status field.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.
test_cases.expected_result: 200; each notification has status (READ or UNREAD).

test_cases.test_description: Verify each notification has message or title field.

test_cases.test_description: Verify each notification has createdAt timestamp.

test_cases.test_description: Verify notifications returned newest first.

test_cases.test_description: Verify totalCount present in response.

test_cases.test_description: Verify each notification has a type/category field.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify count returned with status=READ matches actual READ notifications.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.test_description: Verify count returned with status=UNREAD matches actual UNREAD notifications.
steps: Validate status code, response body, persistence, scope, and side effects.

test_cases.expected_result: Either 400/422 (preferred) or 200 with default eventType set; never 5xx.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify behavior when body omits tenantId — caller's tenant should be inferred from token.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 with notification created against caller's tenant; OR 400 if explicit required; never 5xx.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify empty-string eventType is rejected.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify an unrecognized eventType value is either rejected or stored verbatim per policy.
test_cases.expected_result: 400/422 if enum enforced, OR 200 with verbatim storage; never 5xx.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify metadata as a nested JSON object is stored intact.
test_cases.expected_result: 200; subsequent read returns the same nested structure.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify a metadata object > server limit (e.g., >256KB) is rejected.
test_cases.expected_result: 413 Payload Too Large or 400; never 5xx; never silently truncated.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify Unicode/emoji content in fields is preserved and not corrupted.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify HTML/script payloads in metadata are stored safely (not executed/reflected).
test_cases.expected_result: 200 with verbatim storage; no reflection in subsequent renders; never 5xx.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify a successful create persists a row that subsequent GET can fetch by id.
test_cases.expected_result: 200; subsequent GET /notifications/{id} returns 200 with matching fields.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify the recipient's listing endpoint includes the new notification after create.
test_cases.input_data: Create notification targeting recipient X; then GET /notifications as X.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 on create; subsequent list as X includes the new notification id.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify the audit log entry for a create includes the initiating user/actor and timestamp.
test_cases.input_data: Create notification, then query audit log for the action.
test_cases.expected_result: 200 on create; audit-log row exists with actor=caller, action=NOTIFICATION_CREATE, ISO timestamp.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify DELETE on the create path returns 405.
test_cases.expected_result: 405 Method Not Allowed; Allow header lists POST.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.

test_cases.test_description: Verify body with an unknown property is rejected per `additionalProperties:false`.
steps: Validate response status, response body, scope, persistence or read-only behavior, and audit trace where required.
